scripts.update-all: node --import tsx updateScript/updateProject.mjs && node --import tsx updateScript/updatePackages.mjs && node --import tsx updateScript/make-cache.mjs && node --import tsx updateScript/make-leaderboard.mjs && node --import tsx updateScript/make-periodic-table.mjs
scripts.build: npm run update-all && next build && touch ./build/.nojekyll
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:components && npm run test:integration
scripts.lighthouse:ci: npm run build:ci && npm run lighthouse
scripts.lighthouse:all: node clean-lh-tmp.mjs && lighthouse http://localhost:3000/ --preset desktop --output html --output-path ./lighthouse-reports/home.html --chrome-flags="--no-sandbox --disable-gpu --headless=new" && lighthouse http://localhost:3000/about/ --preset desktop --output html --output-path ./lighthouse-reports/about.html --chrome-flags="--no-sandbox --disable-gpu --headless=new" && lighthouse http://localhost:3000/projects/ --preset desktop --output html --output-path ./lighthouse-reports/projects.html --chrome-flags="--no-sandbox --disable-gpu --headless=new" && lighthouse http://localhost:3000/contributors/ --preset desktop --output html --output-path ./lighthouse-reports/contributors.html --chrome-flags="--no-sandbox --disable-gpu --headless=new" && lighthouse http://localhost:3000/packages/ --preset desktop --output html --output-path ./lighthouse-reports/packages.html --chrome-flags="--no-sandbox --disable-gpu --headless=new"
